chin_falam.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) nih bebop harmony kha system in a ser. A system nih 7ths hmun ah 6th chords a hman i aw hruainak a nemnak awkah scale degree karlak ah diminished passing chords a chiah.
chin_falam.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: volume a khatnak tlin awkah caan. Decay: sustain tiang a nuamnak caan. Sustain: volume level a mancakmi. Release: key na chuah hnu ah a thi awkah caan.
chin_falam.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale cu pitch a remhmi pawl an si. Modes cu degree phundang in a thawkmi scale rotation an si. Pakhat cio nih lungthin ruahnak dang a ser.
chin_falam.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chords cu interval (3rds) khan hlan in ser an si. Major nih major 3rd + minor 3rd a hman. Minor nih a leng. Extended chords nih 7ths, 9ths le a tam deuh an chiah.
chin_falam.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks nih pitch sweep a ngeimi sine oscillator an hman. Snares nih noise (filtered) + tone body an pehtlaih. Hi-hats nih high-pass filtered noise bursts an hman.
chin_falam.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = bar pakhat ah quarter-note beats 4 (a tam bikmi). 3/4 = waltz ruahnak. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 le 7/8 nih grooves aa lawmlomi, ram dang an ser.
chin_falam.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys cu clockwise in a kaimi 5ths in remh an si. A naih keys nih note 7 chungin 6 an rualh. Clockwise in kal nih sharps a chiah; a lettu ah flats a chiah.
chin_falam.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Music aw paoh nih fundamental cung ah overtones a ngei. An thazang relative nih timbre a khiah — cucaah trumpet nih flute he pitch pakhat ah a dang in aa theih.
chin_falam.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval cu pitch pahnih karlak hlat a si, semitones in tahmi a si. Frequency ratio nih consonance a khiah (3:2 bantuk ratio a fawimi cu a nem in aa theih).
chin_falam.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Chord note pawl kha pakhat cio in remh in a tuk. A cung = a niang in a sang, A niang = a sang in a niang. Chords a dinmi in a luangmi pattern a ser.
chin_falam.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter nih cutoff frequency a cungah (lowpass), a niangah (highpass), asiloah a kulh ah (bandpass) frequencies a hlonh. Resonance (Q) nih cutoff a naih frequencies a karh i peak a ser.
chin_falam.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: caan tluk in volume thlennak (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: caan tluk in pitch thlennak (frequency modulation). A pahnih in LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator) nih an uk.
chin_falam.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: 1983 ah hmuh a si. Noise burst nih feedback a ngeimi delay line a tawi tukmi ah a lut. Delay time nih pitch a khiah. Feedback loop chungah filter nih ceunak le decay a uk. Plucked strings kha a taktak in a i chuah.
chin_falam.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer cu composition tool a si. Step pakhat cio nih beat subdivision a langhter. Melody row nih pitched notes a chiah, drums nih rhythm a chiah. Musical notation nih na sermi a langhter.
chin_falam.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Line le space cung notes nih pitches a langhter. Duration cu note lakhmi in a langh: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff nih line 5 a ngei.
chin_falam.try_to_match_this_pattern: Hi pattern he i tluk awk zuam!
chin_falam.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: octave pakhat ah note 12, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Bach nih Well-Tempered Clavier (1722) nih vawlei kha hi compromise ah a i thlaih ter. Hika na tukmi note paoh cu cu grid cungah an um.
chin_falam.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) cu major scale interval pattern lehnak in an rat.
chin_falam.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords nih third dang an chiah. Pop music = ~chords 6 an i cang; jazz nih extensions le substitutions a hman.
chin_falam.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — cinematic score paoh a niang i ihkhun. Minor ah iv-V-i, asiloah Hans Zimmer ruahnak awkah i-VI-VII zuam. Fifths ah drones nih India classical music le bagpipe phunglam an bawmh.
chin_falam.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Music a hlawhtling deuh cu 4/4, 90-130 BPM ah an um. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (half-time ruahnak). Kick 1+3 ah, snare 2+4 ah = backbeat — rock + pop i hram.
chin_falam.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~BCE 500) nih integer frequency ratios in consonance a hmuh: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz nih 1862 ah a karhter. Aw = compression waves; music = a dawh tiah kan i thlahmi pattern.
chin_falam.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid a khatmi, strum plate le voice presets
chin_falam.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Strum awkah strings cung ah hnawh!
chin_falam.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis nih oscillator pakhat (modulator) hman in a dang (carrier) frequency kha a rangmi in a thlen. Modulator:carrier ratio nih harmonic content a khiah. Ratio a fawimi (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) nih harmonic tones a chuahter. Ratio a harsami nih metallic, bell-like asiloah inharmonic sounds a chuahter. Yamaha DX7 nih 1983 ah FM a hlawhtling ter.
chin_falam.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw nih sawtooth oscillators tampi kha a hoihte in detune tuahmi an hlan. Hihi nih aw nganpi, kau, aa ceumi a ser — EDM, trance le pop tharah hmelchunhnak. Voices tampi = a sa deuh nain CPU tampi a hman. Detuning nih voices kha tuning ah zeitluk in an i hlat a uk — detune tampi = kau deuh/chorus bantuk, tlawm = a chiar/a i cinken.
chin_falam.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator nih chord note pawl kha pakhat cio in remh in a tuk. "A cung" cu a niang in a sang, thazang a sang a ser. "A niang" cu a nuam, tiva bantuk ruahnak a pek. A rannak nih rannak a uk (a tlawm = a rang). Gate nih note pakhat cio zeitluk a ram a uk (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Classic trance arp awkah rannak=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern zuam!
chin_falam.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Hla sa, bia chim, asiloah tumtu tuk — effects kha caan takah ngai!
chin_falam.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitor (namah le namah i ngai — headphones hman!)
chin_falam.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Effects nih Sound Waves Zeitin dah a Thlen
chin_falam.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Threshold a cungah (lowpass) asiloah a niangah (highpass) frequencies a hlonh. Kut in ka a khuhmi bantuk — frequency a sangmi a thi, aw cu "a mut" deuh a si.
chin_falam.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Signal kha copy in caan tawite hnu ah tuk than in echoes a ser. Feedback nih echoes zeizat dah an i cang a uk.
chin_falam.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Aa pehtlaihmi echoes tete thongkhat kha ser in room acoustics a i chuah. Room te = reverb tawi, cathedral = reverb sau.
chin_falam.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Waveform peaks a at i sine waves a nemmi kha a khar, a kil a ngeimi shape ah a leh. Hihi nih aw hlanmi ah a um lomi harmonics thar a chiah.
chin_falam.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Signal kha delay tete zungzal in a thlenmi he a copy. Hihi nih voices/tumtu tampi caan tete i tluk lo in aa tluahmi bantuk a i chuah.
chin_falam.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Volume kha a rangmi in a sang le a niang a thlen, a phumi effect a ser. Surf guitar le organ music ah a fih.
chin_falam.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Feedback loops hrial awkah monitoring na tuah tikah headphones hman! Mic cu a cung effects vialte (filter, delay, reverb, le adang) a luan chin — pakhat cio nih na aw asiloah na tumtu zeitin dah a thlen ti ngai awkah remh hna.
chin_falam.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Na aw asiloah na tumtu kha caan takah effects chain ah luanter awkah na microphone pehtlaih.
chin_falam.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Na aw kha waveform + frequency spectrum in zoh. Filter, delay, reverb, distortion le chorus nih sound waves kha pumsa lei in zeitin dah a thlen ti ngai.
chin_falam.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Tongh & hnawh — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
chin_falam.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad nih na kutzung/mouse hmun kha caan takah musical parameters ah a map. X axis nih pitch a uk (veh = niang, orh = sang). Y axis nih filter cutoff frequency a uk (cung = ceu, niang = mut). Hihi cu Korg Kaoss Pad bantuk tumtu he aa lo, 2D gestures kha aw ah leh in live electronic music performance a thlen.
chin_falam.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Veh–orh cu pitch, cung–niang cu filter ceunak. I hlaw le note tuk awkah arrow keys hman; dinh awkah Escape asiloah Space hneh.
chin_falam.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & a tam deuh →
chin_falam.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Notes chiah awkah cells click — visual melody editor
chin_falam.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions a fihmi — ngai awkah click
chin_falam.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions nih lungthin khualtlawnnak a ser. Chord I (tonic) cu 'inn' bantuk aa theih. Chord V (dominant) nih I ah kir tthan a duhmi harnak a ser. Chord vi (relative minor) nih ngaihchiatnak asiloah thuknak a chiah. Chord IV (subdominant) cu inn in a nemtein a hlat. I-V-vi-IV progression cu hi lungthin ruahnak kha a ttha tein a i cinken caah pop hla 70% chunglei ah a langh tiah ruah a si.
chin_falam.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Roman numerals (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) nih scale degrees a langhter. Cakan nganpi = major chord. Cakan tete = minor chord.
chin_falam.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: A cung grid ah melody notes chiah ↑
chin_falam.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Hika notation hmuh awkah a cung grid ah melody cells click
chin_falam.load_this_rhythm_into_row_0_kick: Hi rhythm hi row 0 (Kick) ah load?
chin_falam.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Rhythm patterns zuam awkah "Ka zuam ter!" click
chin_falam.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Custom pads awkah WAV/MP3 files upload. Page na refresh tikah samples an thi.
chin_falam.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Patterns kha hla a khatmi ah pehtlaih
chin_falam.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Atu pattern kha section ah chiah
chin_falam.add_current_as_section: + Atu Mi Kha Section Ah Chiah
chin_falam.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: A cung grid ah drum pattern ser, cun hla ser thawk awkah "+ Atu Mi Kha Section Ah Chiah" click.
chin_falam.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
chin_falam.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Beats khumhmi a um rih lo. Pattern ser i Khumh click!
chin_falam.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad nih sine le triangle waves pehtlaih in warm, tones thiang a ser. Voice thim, a niang grid in chord la, cun plate strum!
chin_falam.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — thim awkah tongh, strum awkah Space
chin_falam.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — tongh asiloah cung ah hnawh
chin_falam.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Ngai, waveform zoh, i tumtu paoh tuanbia cawn
chin_falam.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Hitin tumtu phundang nih an aw a hleiceu kha an hmuh! Flute cu harmonic 1 (sine) a tam bik. Clarinet nih odd harmonics (1,3,5,7) a ngei. Violin nih vialte a ngei. Na timbre ser awkah click!
chin_falam.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis nih filtered feedback a ngeimi delay line ah thawn mi noise burst tawi hman in plucked string aw a taktak a ser. String mizia ser awkah brightness (noise a hmasa bik rong) le damping (sustain saunak) remh.
chin_falam.what_type_of_chord_do_you_hear: Zei phun chord dah na ngai?
chin_falam.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: High harmonics a thawnak — a sun / aa ceu.
chin_falam.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental a rit, highs a nem. Acoustic bantuk.
chin_falam.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Fundamental um lo in mid a rit — thing bantuk/cuckoo flute.
chin_falam.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Fundamental thiang cheu — a hukmi / sub bantuk.
chin_falam.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics cheukhat aa tluk — a khat / timbre a taktak.
chin_falam.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Fundamental, mid le high harmonic levels remh. Widget nih aw kha timbre panga karlak pakhat ah a chiah. Score a um lo, langhternak a um lo — sweep i zoh lawng.
chin_falam.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Ruahnak (ca lawngmi): Zei harmonic level dah "ceu" le "warm" a khiah?
chin_falam.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Na tang — prompts a hongmi langhter
chin_falam.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Sliders pahnih fek in manh. Pakhat thlen. Zoh.
chin_falam.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Timbre pakhat a chuahtermi settings pahnih hmuh. Zei ratios dah an rualh?
chin_falam.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Tumtu taktak nih mizia spectra an ngei. Flute nih violin he zeicaah a dang in aa theih ti hlei ttheh.
chin_falam.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ka hngalh — namah cahmi in fianter
chin_falam.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Harmonic content nih timbre theihhngalhnak zeitin dah a khiah ti fianter.
chin_falam.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Design note: timbre marker class 5 aa dangmi; acoustic fidelity score a um lo; langhternak a um lo — tuahduhnak in.
chin_falam.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: nifate biafang fawi le biachang tawi hman in, jargon um lo
chin_falam.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: grade 5 sianngakchia caah, tawi le hawikom in
chin_falam.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: music theory cheu a hngalmi sianngakchia caah
chin_falam.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Na thimmi reading level ah hi view nih zei a cawnpiak ti AI tutor nih a fianter awkah "Fianter" click.
chin_falam.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Tumtu nih Zeicaah A Dang in An Aw
